description: You are a literacy specialist at Oakwood Unified School District assessing GCompris for use in a kindergarten reading readiness program. Explore the Letters, Words, and Vocabulary sub-tabs within the Language/Reading section of GCompris, interacting with at least 4 different activities to evaluate their instructional approach. Document your findings in a formal Reading Readiness Assessment Report at ~/Desktop/reading_readiness_report.txt. The report must include labeled sections for each sub-tab listing all visible activity names, the reading skills targeted, and suitability recommendations for kindergartners (ages 4-6). Login: ga / password123
